meta.note: Feature row, grain = one semantic chunk (ADR-002). Ported from models/marts/core/_core.yml dbt tests (dbt dropped, ADR-008). The asset_id->dim_asset FK was a dbt `relationships` test; runs as a Warehouse reconciliation query here (meta.referential).
referential: every fact_chunk.asset_id must exist in dim_asset.asset_id (was dbt relationships -> dim_asset)
